backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a printing service platform with user profiles, quotation management, project portfolio, reviews, chat system, admin invitations, blob storage, and access control with role-based permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state to new actor state by adding adminUsers and emailToPrincipal maps while preserving existing data structures and converting nextId from Int to Nat.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of admin authentication (email/password and biometric), admin user management interface, WebAuthn biometric flow, and layout updates to support new admin login system.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including hooks for data management, pages for customer and admin interfaces, components for UI elements, and utilities for blob storage and authentication.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining color schemes for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar colors using oklch color space.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application router using TanStack Router defining all routes including home, services, quotations, gallery, testimonials, admin pages (login, dashboard, quotations, projects, logo, chats, users), with Layout wrapper and ProfileSetup component.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: A React component that protects admin routes by checking authentication and admin status, displaying loading states or access denied messages with navigation options if unauthorized.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget component that allows users to send messages after providing name and email, with local storage persistence and chat history display.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component providing header navigation with logo, responsive menu, role-based navigation links (public, customer, admin), login button, and chat widget integration.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity authentication, toggling between login and logout states with loading indicators and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-like history of negotiation messages between customers and admins with sender avatars and timestamps.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without profiles to complete their setup by entering name, email, and mobile number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with identity-based authentication, handling actor recreation on identity changes and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Custom hook that queries whether the current caller has admin privileges using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Provides a mutation hook for verifying admin email/password authentication with SHA-256 password hashing.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for fetching admin invitations and creating new admin user invitations with SHA-256 hashed passwords.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides React hooks for biometric authentication using WebAuthn, including login and registration mutations that check device support and interact with the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Exports React Query hooks for chat functionality including sending messages, fetching all chat messages, owner replies, and customer chat history with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to get and set company logo using React Query, with automatic cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Exports a mutation hook to calculate delivery fees based on distance using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication provider and hook for ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to respond to quotation negotiations with automatic invalidation of quotation queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Exports hooks to get and set office location data with React Query caching and invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides comprehensive project management hooks including fetching all projects, filtering by category, and CRUD operations (add, edit, delete) with cache invalidation.
Exports a mutation hook for handling quotation responses with status updates and optional messages, invalidating related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Exports hooks for quotation management including fetching all/user quotations, creating requests, adding details, and approving quotations with automatic cache updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook to fetch quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating counts) with 30-second auto-refresh interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides hooks to fetch all reviews, filter by rating, and add new reviews with service type categorization and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Exports hooks to get and save the caller's user profile with loading state management and query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for a print industry-inspired design system featuring vibrant cyan primary colors, warm orange accents, and comprehensive dark mode support.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Utility class for handling blob storage URLs with methods to create blobs from URLs or bytes, track upload progress, and retrieve blob data as bytes or direct URLs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying company information, benefits (expert design, modern technology, customer focus), and commitment values with hero section and feature cards.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard showing quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) in card format with icons and color-coded metrics. Protected by AdminGuard component.
Admin login page supporting both email/password authentication and biometric WebAuthn login. Includes form validation and redirects to admin dashboard on successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management interface for inviting new admin users with email and password, displaying existing admin invitations in a table with status badges. Protected by AdminGuard component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin chat management page displaying customer messages grouped by email with expandable conversation threads. Allows admins to reply to customer messages with a textarea and send button.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and managing the company logo with image preview, file validation (5MB limit, image types only), and upload progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for CRUD operations on projects, including image uploads with progress tracking, categorization by ServiceType, and form dialogs for adding/editing project details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing quotation requests with features to add pricing details, approve quotations, respond to negotiations, and view negotiation history with status badges.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Delivery information page with service area details (35 km radius) and an interactive calculator to compute delivery fees based on distance input.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring hero section with call-to-action buttons, features showcase (expert design, modern technology, customer focus), and services preview section.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: User quotations dashboard requiring authentication, displaying list of user's quotation requests with expandable details, status badges, and office location information.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Project gallery page displaying completed work with category filtering (digital, banner, offset, design) and grid layout of project cards with images and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Displays a confirmation page after a quotation request is submitted, showing the request ID and explaining the next steps in the quotation approval and negotiation process.
Provides a form for customers to request quotations by selecting service type, deadline, project details, and contact information, then navigates to the confirmation page on successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Allows authenticated users to view their quotations and respond by accepting, rejecting, or negotiating them, with a dialog for sending negotiation messages and viewing negotiation history.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a grid of four service categories (Digital Printing, Flex & Banner, Offset Printing, Creative Design) with descriptions and lists of specific offerings for each service type.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Provides a form for customers to submit reviews including name, rating, review text, project type, and optional image upload with progress tracking, then navigates to testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays customer testimonials with filtering by star rating, showing review cards with ratings, comments, and customer photos. Includes a link to submit new reviews and uses skeleton loaders during data fetching.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn utility functions for biometric authentication including platform authenticator support detection, credential registration/authentication flows, and ArrayBuffer/Base64 conversion helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme including sidebar colors, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordions and fade-ins.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a business website for Nellore Print Hub with 9 implemented features including homepage, about page, services, quotation system, admin dashboard, payment integration, and delivery management. Defines architectural notes for manual quotation workflow, role-based access, payment gateway integration, and real-time chat system.
